overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai warrior walking through a misty spring forest with blooming cherry trees. The character moves through tall grass and falling petals along a hillside path with cinematic lighting and atmospheric effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside meadow with blooming cherry trees

events.description: character steps from tall grass onto a dirt trail

agents.ego_description: samurai walking steadily uphill through tall grass toward a dirt trail

entered.detail: trees with white blossoms lining the left side of the meadow
tall green grass covering the hillside
narrow dirt path cutting through the grass

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks through a lush meadow with tall grass and blooming cherry trees on the left. The character approaches and steps onto a dirt trail, with petals falling gently through the misty air.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with dense tree canopy

events.description: moving from open meadow into denser forested area with larger trees
camera passes between two large tree trunks flanking the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail through denser forest with misty atmosphere

entered.detail: tall dark pine trees on the right side of the trail
hazy atmospheric perspective in the distance

segments.scene_description: The path leads into a denser forest area with large pine trees on the right and a misty backdrop. The character passes between two prominent tree trunks as the trail continues uphill.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit meadow with scattered trees and falling petals

events.description: emerging from tree cover into bright sunlit area with strong backlighting and visible sun glare

agents.ego_description: walking through sunlit tall grass with cherry blossom petals falling around

entered.detail: bright sunlight filtering through mist creating golden glow
large rocks or stone structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dense forest, the scene opens into a sunlit meadow with strong backlighting. The character walks through tall grass toward a distant rock formation as cherry blossom petals drift through the golden light.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching stone ruins or outcrop in the meadow

events.description: approaching a rocky outcrop or stone structure at the edge of the meadow

agents.ego_description: approaching the stone structure through the grass with the sun behind it

entered.detail: large rocks or ruins becoming prominent in the foreground
thick cluster of trees on the right side

segments.scene_description: The samurai approaches a stone outcrop or ruins in the meadow, with blooming trees now closer on the left and a dense tree cluster on the right. The destination becomes clearly visible as the character continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty spring forest that gradually opens into a sunlit, golden meadow. It begins with a samurai walking through a lush meadow of tall grass and blooming cherry trees before stepping onto a dirt trail filled with falling petals. As the character progresses, the path leads into a denser forest of large pine trees and thick mist, guiding the camera uphill between prominent trunks. The scene then expands as the character emerges from the woods into a bright, backlit meadow where the lighting shifts to warm gold and petals drift toward a distant rock formation. Finally, the camera follows the samurai through the tall grass toward a stone outcrop and ruins, flanked by blooming trees and dense clusters of foliage.
